title: asymmetricHalfBridge
description: The description of an Asymmetric Half-Bridge (AHB) converter (Imbertson-Mohan 1993): single-leg, two-switch isolated PWM converter with DC-blocking capacitor and complementary D/(1-D) drive.

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the AHB converter

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop of the rectifier diode (or SR FET drain-source drop)

useLeakageInductance.description: Whether to use transformer leakage inductance for ZVS

leakageInductance.description: Optional explicit primary leakage inductance in henries

magnetizingInductance.description: Optional explicit primary magnetizing inductance in henries

outputInductance.description: Optional explicit output filter inductance in henries

dcBlockingCapacitance.description: Optional explicit DC-blocking capacitance in farads

maximumDutyCycle.description: Maximum duty cycle of Q1 (chosen branch of non-monotonic gain curve, conventionally <= 0.5)

inputVoltageStepRange.description: Optional Vin step magnitude (in volts) used to compute worst-case transient flux excursion

ahbRectifierType.description: The type of secondary rectifier for the AHB
ahbRectifierType.title: ahbRectifierType

ahbOperatingPoint.description: The description of one AHB operating point
ahbOperatingPoint.title: ahbOperatingPoint

dutyCycle.description: Commanded duty cycle of Q1 for this operating point (0 < D <= 0.5 for the conventional non-monotonic gain branch). Schema bounds 0 <= D <= 1 to permit the upper-branch research configuration.
